title: 05 mango crew tactile redesign
prompt: Use case: ads-marketing. REFERENCE AUTHORITY — Image 1 controls the mango species: irregular leaning mango-fruit body, tiny nub hands and feet, dot eyes, tiny mouth, warm yellow-orange translucent gummy material, and handmade miniature-set charm. Remove its pink bleacher prop and group arrangement. Image 2 controls only the turntable layout; do not copy its larger mascot limbs, leaf cap, or polished generic face. OUTPUT — one consistent mango helper shown in full-body front, three-quarter front, strict side, and back views, plus small hauling and cheering action callouts. Preserve the minimal face and almost-limbless proportions from Image 1. Identical soft studio light across all views. AVOID — character labels, signs, separate accessories, human anatomy, bear ears, clothing, large arms, large shoes, plastic-toy finish.

resolved_params.system_prompt: Create a clean reference-ready character turntable. Image 1 is the character-design authority; preserve its appealing proportions, personality, face simplicity, and tactile material. Image 2 is layout authority only. Show the same character consistently across angles on a plain off-white studio background. No environment, human figures, packaging, captions, labels, borders, watermark, or unrelated redesign.
